metadata.title: Wafinix — Website, System & App Development
metadata.description: A software house for small businesses to enterprises: websites, POS & ERP systems, integrated orders & payments, AI & chatbots. Indonesia & global.

footer.blurb: We help your business grow with thoughtfully crafted websites, systems, and apps — from small businesses to enterprises, for Indonesia and the world.

hero.title: Digital products that help your business <hl>grow</hl>
hero.subtitle: Wafinix builds websites, systems, and apps — from company profiles to ERP, with orders & payments recorded automatically. For small businesses to enterprises, in Indonesia and worldwide.

services.title: One team for all your digital needs
services.subtitle: From the first landing page to the system that runs your operations — we design, build, and maintain it.

industries.title: Trusted across industries
industries.subtitle: Every industry has unique needs. We've already shaped the solutions.

global.title: From <hl>Indonesia</hl> to the world
global.subtitle: Bilingual websites, prices in Rupiah or USD, and both local and international payments — your business is ready to serve customers anywhere.
points: Bilingual Indonesian & English with one click
Local payments (QRIS, transfer, e-wallet) & international (cards, crypto)
Fast performance with a global CDN

process.title: We don't just start coding
process.subtitle: Every project begins with thorough planning — so the result is focused, consistent, and easy to grow.

steps.title: Consultation & Discovery
steps.desc: We understand your business goals, target users, and needs before a single line is written.

steps.title: Planning & Documents
steps.desc: A PRD, system architecture, and database design come first — not just build-on-request.

steps.title: UI/UX Design
steps.desc: Warm, easy-to-use mockups and prototypes, approved before development begins.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: Incremental coding with testing at every step, plus transparent progress updates.

steps.title: Launch & Support
steps.desc: Deployment, training for your team, and maintenance to keep everything running smoothly.

testimonials.title: What they say
testimonials.note: Illustrative — to be replaced with real client testimonials.

items.quote: The POS generates daily reports automatically. Now we know our stock and revenue exactly, no manual counting.
items.name: Rani

items.quote: Our booking site leveled up. Guests reserve a room and pay right away, and the data stays tidy.
items.name: Bagus

items.quote: What sets them apart is starting from documents. Our needs were truly understood before any work began.
items.name: Hendra

security.title: Secure from the foundation
security.subtitle: Transaction security is our highest priority — not an afterthought.

items.title: Encryption & HTTPS
items.desc: End-to-end SSL and strict security headers protect every connection.

items.title: OWASP protection
items.desc: Input validation, anti-XSS, and rate limiting following OWASP standards.

items.title: Verified payments
items.desc: Signed webhooks with amount matching — statuses can't be faked.

items.title: Audit & backup
items.desc: Every key action is logged; data is backed up regularly and recoverable.

cta.title: Ready to start your project?
cta.subtitle: Tell us what you need — the first consultation is free, no strings attached.

layanan.title: What we build
layanan.subtitle: From the first page to the system that runs your business — everything thoughtfully planned, cleanly built, and maintained.
layanan.techSubtitle: We pick the right tool for each problem — not one hammer for everything.
layanan.ctaSubtitle: Tell us what you need and we'll map out the best solution — free.
